title: JAGGAER Quay Optimization Job
description: Schema for a JAGGAER ASO Quay optimization job, representing a computational task that runs the sourcing optimization algorithm against event bid data.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the Quay optimization job.

consumer.description: The system submitting the optimization job.

customerId.description: Identifier for the customer submitting the job.

customerName.description: Name of the customer. Maximum 100 characters.

eventId.description: Identifier for the sourcing event associated with this optimization job.

inputFilename.description: Fully qualified path to the input file on the ASO filesystem. Maximum 100 characters.

status.description: Current processing status of the optimization job.

optSetType.description: Type of optimization set used for this job.

submitTime.description: Timestamp when the job was submitted, as 13-digit Unix epoch time in milliseconds.

inprocAtSubmit.description: Number of other jobs in process at the time this job was submitted.

runClient.description: Hostname of the Quay client that executed this job.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory for this job on the ASO filesystem.

processStartTime.description: Timestamp when the job started running, as 13-digit Unix epoch time in milliseconds.

processStopTime.description: Timestamp when the job completed, as 13-digit Unix epoch time in milliseconds.

notificationHostname.description: Optional ASO Clearsuite notification server hostname. For development use only. Maximum 250 characters.

notificationPort.description: Optional ASO Clearsuite notification server port. For development use only.
